import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        sum = sum + v
        count = count + 1
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  let avg = sum / count
  print("avg=#{avg}")
  Ok(())
end
